message:
Enhance prechecks defaults and add shell-free notify command option

- prechecks.rs: Initialize LivePreCheckProvider with default known supervisors
  (systemd, init, upstart, supervisord, runit, s6-supervise, runsv,
  containerd-shim, docker-containerd) and protected filter from guardrails,
  avoiding empty defaults that would miss common supervisor processes
- quick_scan.rs: Redirect stderr to null instead of capturing, reducing
  memory allocation when ps output includes stderr diagnostics
- CLI_SPECIFICATION.md: Add --notify-cmd and --notify-arg options for direct
  command execution without shell interpolation, with precedence note

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -104,7 +104,7 @@ pub fn quick_scan(options: &QuickScanOptions) -> Result<ScanResult, QuickScanErr
     // Execute and capture output
     let mut child = cmd
         .stdout(Stdio::piped())
-        .stderr(Stdio::piped())
+        .stderr(Stdio::null())
         .spawn()
         .map_err(|e| QuickScanError::CommandFailed(e.to_string()))?;

@@ -490,11 +490,16 @@ pt-core agent watch [OPTIONS]
 
 | Option | Description |
 |--------|-------------|
-| `--notify-exec <cmd>` | Execute on threshold crossing |
+| `--notify-exec <cmd>` | Execute via shell on threshold crossing |
+| `--notify-cmd <cmd>` | Execute directly (no shell) on threshold crossing |
+| `--notify-arg <arg>` | Repeatable args for `--notify-cmd` |
 | `--format jsonl` | Stream events |
 | `--threshold low\|medium\|high\|critical` | Trigger sensitivity |
 | `--interval <seconds>` | Check frequency (default: 60) |
 
+Notes:
+- If both `--notify-cmd` and `--notify-exec` are set, `--notify-cmd` takes precedence.
+
 **Events Emitted:**
 
 | Event | Description |
